allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit — SoundGlobal by theserjs *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add Wikidata logo to PoweredBy alongside Deezer, Last.fm, MusicBrainz *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use --legacy-peer-deps in Docker build for react-simple-maps *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use port 3001 to avoid conflict with theserjs_admin *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'], '|', a['imageUrl'][:60] if a['imageUrl'] else 'EMPTY'\) for a in d['topArtists']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'],'|',a['imageUrl'][:80] if a['imageUrl'] else 'EMPTY'\) for a in d['topArtists']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'],'|',a['imageUrl'][:70] if a['imageUrl'] else 'EMPTY'\) for a in d['topArtists']]")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: fast Wikidata query \(no GROUP BY\) + add cdn-images.dzcdn.net domain *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove environment override that was wiping LASTFM_API_KEY *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: hover tooltip with flag + zoom +/- buttons on map *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove onMoveEnd not in ZoomableGroup type declarations *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: responsive mobile layout + map country glitch effect *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: clean header on mobile, move drawer buttons to map strips *)
